ogTitle: Petrudor vs Piara Waters: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Petrudor and Piara Waters.
heading: Petrudor vs Piara Waters — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Petrudor, Western Australia and Piara Waters, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Piara Waters has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Petrudor (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Petrudor or Piara Waters safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Petrudor has a flood risk score of 49/100, while Piara Waters scores 32/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Petrudor scores 53/100 for bushfire risk. Piara Waters scores 24/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Petrudor or Piara Waters?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Piara Waters has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.43% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
